transforms: Extract the dated BORDER CROSSINGS status rows from the Logistics Cluster alert page.
Match source crossing name pairs to existing canonical border crossing location IDs.
Normalize source status wording into observedStatus values while preserving concise source-backed notes.
Store the source publication date as both statusAsOf and sourceReferences[].sourceRecordDate.
Keep canonical data/locations.json operationalStatus values unchanged.
reviewNotes: Imported 9 dated status snapshot records for matched canonical border crossings. No new crossing identities were added, and no location operationalStatus values were changed. The source terms limit reuse to non-commercial humanitarian or related non-profit/academic activity with attribution, so this source should be reviewed again before broad commercial redistribution.
